nature_lash.name: Nature Lash
nature_lash.description: Setup/Builder: Whip the target with a vine. Generates 15 Concentration and 10 Stamina.

saturate.name: Saturate
saturate.description: Setup: Drench the target in primal water. Applies [Saturated] and generates 20 Concentration.

gale_force.name: Gale Force
gale_force.description: Payoff: A violent blast of wind. Deals Magic damage. Power is doubled if target is [Saturated].

tempest_wrath.name: Tempest Wrath
tempest_wrath.description: Payoff/AOE: Lightning strikes the room. Deals AOE Magic damage and applies [Shocked] for 4 ticks.

barkskin.name: Barkskin
barkskin.description: Defense: Harden your skin like oak. Reduces all physical damage by 50% for 6 ticks.

wild_growth.name: Wild Growth
wild_growth.description: Defense/Root: Thorns erupt from the ground. Roots all enemies for 3 ticks.

nature_stride.name: Nature Stride
nature_stride.description: Mobility: Merge with the terrain to move instantly between natural areas.

natural_focus.name: Natural Focus
natural_focus.description: Utility/Signature: Commune with the wilds. Restores 40% HP and Concentration.

druid_physiology.name: Druid Physiology
druid_physiology.description: Passive: Forest Warden. You regenerate 5% Concentration every tick and are immune to [Rooted] effects.
